text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Hm? You did great today... too...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh man... Something big happened last night
before I went to bed.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You're not gonna believe this, but a huntsman
spider jumped out from under my hat, like
"ta-da!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... I wonder how it got in there. I've been
thinking it'd be nice to get friendly with a real-life
spider, but that was a bit much...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Matikanetannhauser wasn't able to get
much rest on account of her new eight-legged
friend.
